---
title: "Hi, I'm Saurabh Parate 👋"
subtitle: "Digital Marketer & Marketing Analyst"
image: "Saurabh Parate.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:contact@saurabhp.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/saurabh-parate
    - icon: globe
      text: Website
      href: https://saurabhp.com
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Welcome! I'm a **Digital Marketer & Marketing Analyst** with 5+ years of experience in SEO, paid media, and performance analytics. Currently pursuing my **M.S. in Digital Marketing & Analytics** at Cal Poly Pomona.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🚀 What I Do

|                              |                                    |
|------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| 🔍 **SEO & Optimization**    | On-page, Off-page, Technical SEO   |
| 📊 **Analytics**             | GA4, Looker Studio, Tag Manager    |
| 📢 **Paid Media**            | Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads |
| 🖥️ **CMS Management**        | Cascade CMS, 100+ pages managed    |
| 📈 **Performance Marketing** | CRO, A/B Testing, Data Analysis    |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🏆 Key Highlights

🌐 Managed **100+ website pages** improving SEO and user experience

🎯 Generated **600+ qualified leads** through Google & Meta Ads

💰 Managed a **\$10K Google Ads Grant** campaign for a nonprofit

📐 Experience across **SEO, CRO, analytics, and paid media**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📂 Featured Work

### 🏫 Cal Poly Pomona — Student Digital Marketing Assistant

Managing website content, improving SEO performance, and supporting data-driven marketing campaigns for the College of Business Administration.

### ✈️ Ontario Airport — MSDM Capstone Project

Developing a data-driven framework to measure community engagement ROI for Ontario International Airport.

### 🤝 Trauma Resource Institute — Google Ads Volunteer

Managing a \$10K Google Ads Grant campaign and SEO strategy for a nonprofit promoting trauma resiliency.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 💬 Let's Talk Business

I love good conversations about **business strategy, startups, and growth** — whether it's scaling a brand, cracking a new market, or figuring out how to turn marketing dollars into real revenue. Always happy to connect and exchange ideas!

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎮✈️🍜 Beyond Marketing

When I'm not analyzing data or running campaigns, you'll find me:

🎮 **Gaming** — diving into immersive worlds and sharpening strategic thinking.

![](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExazRsa3gxaDA4ZHJ5N2o1b3ZmZDlzOHF1dnZ1ZWpuMXkwb2kzN3g3cSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/bHSkKRvkRvy5chUBBp/giphy.gif){width="30%"}

✈️ **Travelling** — exploring new places, cultures, and people around the world.

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOWVpMjdzMTczNXMycmxzNHNpeTVnYnhxOWpwbXVmM3J0MGFiYmNvciZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/AErExHJVxRbkm5hPkB/giphy.gif){width="30%"}

🍜 **Food** — always on the hunt for great food, from street tacos to ramen to biryani.

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExY24zMzFpdmllZGdrMTNsdnQ3cmsycGFoeXZicGt4czZsbjFnNG5xNyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/3j0JFe7atOLYdnbwmH/giphy.gif){width="30%"}
